Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
from analyzer.scorer import heuristic_score, resolve_level

tests = [
    \('ООО \\"ГОЧАМИР\\"', 'company'\),
    \('ООО \\"Бьюти Перемен\\"', 'company'\),
    \('ООО \\"Белпромхим\\"', 'company'\),
    \('ООО \\"Айти Солюшнс\\"', 'company'\),
    \('Иванов Иван Иванович', 'person'\),
    \('ООО \\"Продукт Лайн\\"', 'company'\),
]
for name, etype in tests:
    score, reason = heuristic_score\(name, etype\)
    level = resolve_level\(score\)
    print\(f'{name}: score={score} \({level}\) — {reason}'\)
")

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
from analyzer.scorer import heuristic_score, resolve_level

tests = [
    \('ООО \\"ГОЧАМИР\\"', 'company'\),
    \('ООО \\"Бьюти Перемен\\"', 'company'\),
    \('ООО \\"Белпромхим\\"', 'company'\),
    \('ООО \\"Айти Солюшнс\\"', 'company'\),
    \('Иванов Иван Иванович', 'person'\),
    \('ООО \\"Продукт Лайн\\"', 'company'\),
    \('ООО \\"БелАгроТорг\\"', 'company'\),
    \('ООО \\"Медиасервис\\"', 'company'\),
    \('ООО \\"ЮрЦентр\\"', 'company'\),
    \('УП \\"Белпродукт\\"', 'company'\),
]
for name, etype in tests:
    score, reason = heuristic_score\(name, etype\)
    level = resolve_level\(score\)
    print\(f'{score:3d} \({level:6s}\) {name} — {reason}'\)
")

import csv

    reader = csv.DictReader\(f\)
    rows = list\(reader\)

for r in rows:
    print\(f'  {r[\\"label_relevance_score\\"]:>3} \({r[\\"label_relevance_level\\"]:6}\) {r[\\"display_name\\"][:40]} | {r[\\"business_category\\"][:30]}'\)
